calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-30-2004 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-30-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Blumenfeld, Esq. for plaintiff; Mary Ellen marshall, defendant, in pro per.
The parties read a stipulation for settlement into the record.
Defendant agrees to surrender possession of the premises located at 1903A Golden gate Avenue, San Francisco, California by 12:00 noon on Sep-30-2004. Defendant's rent for the months of April, May, July, August and September, 2004 is waived by plaintiff. Plaintiff shall pay defendant moving expenses of $6000 upon delivery of the keys to plaintiff.
If defendant fails to timely vacate and surrender possession of the premises, plaintiff may recover judgment for possession plus money damages in the amount of all unpaid rent and daily rental damages. Defendant waives any right to stay the writ of possession or appeal the judgment. If defendant timely complies with her obligations and vacates possession, plaintiff shall within ten days file a dismissal of this action.
Both parties acknowledge their understanding of and agreement to the terms of the settlement agreement.
The settlement is approved by the Court.
Judge: Gerald Ragan; Clelrk: Craig Blackstone; Reporter: Floyd Butler (D. 622)

MOTION TO COMPEL ATTENDANCE AT DEPOSITION
Off Calendar Aug-27-2004 Text Ruling

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-27-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Blumenfeld, Esq. for Plaintiff; Defendant Mary Ellen Marshall In Pro Per.
Settlement conference held before Will Chen, Judge Pro Tem. Case does not settle. Trial date maintained. Clerk: Craig Blackstone; D. 218.
